grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: No specific section numbers mentioned, only general references to 'CA Conveyancing Protocol'

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: States '2021 is inside typical enforcement windows' but doesn't specify the 4-year rule for operational development

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Clearly discusses when indemnity insurance should/shouldn't be used and mentions obtaining missing permissions as preferred approach

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'Planning and Building Regulations are separate—check both' and explains both regimes

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: Mentions enforcement periods exist but doesn't specify the actual timeframes (4 years for operational development, 10 years for breach of condition, etc.)
